messages.body: Hey Farzana, we’ve cancelled the subscription and taken everything down from our end. It’s truly been a pleasure working with you, and I hope our paths cross again in the future!
Hi! The integration on google is still active - the spam posts are going up regularly and I keep deleting them. Please deactivate this integration at your earliest convenience
Hi! Just noticed that the November payment was taken - please process a refund as soon as possible thank you
Hey Farzana, The subscription has been canceled, and the refund has been processed. I’m truly sorry for the inconvenience caused and wish you all the very best with everything ahead.
Perfect! Thank you!
Hey Farzana! I’ve cross checked with Shipra - she no longer as access to the ads account
Are you trying to revoke Shipras access?
Ok
The entire process has been streamlined — we just need 24–48 hours to get everything completed. Thank you so much for your patience and understanding, it truly means a lot!
459107 is your Facebook code. Don't share it.
Thank you. It looks like the posts are still going up - I just took down two more
The posts have not yet been disabled- pleass let me know when this is done. Thank you.
Also there’s a pending payment coming out in a few days - please check that this has been cancelled.
Hey Farzana - the team has been informed about the status of the profile:)
Hey Farzana — the daily posts are currently being uploaded automatically through our system. I’ll update my team to disable that for you:)
Hi! I noticed that there are daily AI generated posts on our Google profile- these are not in keeping with our brand voice. Are you able to turn these off please?
Hey Farzana
Sidhi this just appeared in my feed. Could uou please ask Shruti to delete all the zoca ads? They are poorly worded and do nor reflect our branding
Im disappointed to see this. I dont know how to check if they are turned off. Please confirm
Hey Farzana, I’m so sorry for this!  Let me quickly give you an update
Perfect! Thank you. See you tomorrow!
Hi Sidhi. For our meeting on Wednesday at 10am, I have a clash. Are you available to meet either on Tuesday (tomorrow) at 11am or Wednesday at 11am?
Hey Farzana, I hope you’re well! We can definitely meet tomorrow around 11am:)
